data.title: Roku Stock Jumps As Platform Revenue Growth Accelerates, Profitability Improves
data.description:
Shares of Roku Inc (NASDAQ:ROKU) rallied in early trading on Friday, after the company reported upbeat fourth-quarter results.

Here are the key analyst insights:

Check out other analyst stock ratings.

KeyBanc Capital Markets: Roku reported revenue of $1.40 billion and EBITDA of $169.4 million, topping Street estimates of $1.36 billion and $147 million, respectively, Patterson said in a note. The company's outperformance was driven by strength in Platform revenue, he added.

Management guided to first-quarter revenue and EBITDA of $1.20 billion and $130 million, which came in higher than the consensus of $1.17 billion and $95 million, respectively, the analyst stated. "With Roku transforming into a high-teens Platform revenue grower with improved GAAP EPS and FCF profitability, we believe shares now have valuation support and the potential to attract broader investor sponsorship," he further wrote.

JPMorgan: Roku generated 16% year-on-year revenue growth, driven mostly by Platform revenue growth of 18% versus its 15% guidance, Carpenter said. This implies that core growth, excluding the impacts from political advertising, Frndly, and accounting standard 606, accelerated from 20% in the third quarter to 25% in the latest quarter, he added.

"We didn't expect Roku to initially guide to an acceleration in 2026, but we did think it was critical for the outlook not to imply any deceleration," the analyst wrote. He further stated that management guided to faster growth in the first quarter than the full year due to:

  • Earlier comps in the first quarter
  • The quarter is the last without the impact of the Frndly acquisition
  • There is less visibility in the back half

Benchmark: Expectations from Roku were "exceptionally hot" going into the quarter, Kurnos said. He added, however, that the company's reported figures prove that the "momentum is real."  

"This is arguably the best print and guide that Roku has posted in as long as we can remember, with no mistakes or confusion in the messaging either despite being just 6 weeks into the year and visibility remaining limited," the analyst wrote. The results and guidance indicate management's confidence in Roku's "unique drivers," which should help the company to outperform its peers, he further stated.

ROKU Price Action: Roku shares were up 6.25% at $88.11 at the time of publication on Friday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Photo: Shutterstock

data.title: Medtronic Wins FDA Nod For Spine Surgery Tech Designed To Cut Repeat Imaging
data.description:
On Friday, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration cleared Medtronic plc’s (NYSE:MDT) Stealth AXiS surgical system for spine surgery.

The Stealth AXiS system is cleared for spine procedures in the United States, with an underlying architecture designed to support future cranial and ENT applications, pending 510(k) clearance.

Built to support a wide range of surgeon preferences, clinical complexity, and care settings, the platform is designed for use across hospitals and ambulatory surgery centers without relying on multiple standalone technologies.

Spine Surgery System

The Stealth AXiS system is built to support a variety of surgical preferences and complexities, allowing for real-time visibility into anatomical motion during procedures.

A key innovation of the Stealth AXiS system is LiveAlign segmental tracking, a capability that allows surgeons to visualize anatomic motion, surgical adjustments, and patient alignment in real time during spine surgery, without the need for repeated imaging.

This capability helps reduce reliance on manual steps and workflow disruption, supporting more consistent execution of patient-specific surgical plans.

Technical Analysis

Currently, Medtronic is trading 0.28% below its 20-day simple moving average (SMA) and 1.18% above its 100-day SMA, suggesting a mixed short-term trend. Over the past 12 months, shares have increased 9.41% and are positioned closer to their 52-week highs than lows, reflecting a generally positive longer-term trend.

The RSI is at 49.61, which is considered neutral territory, indicating that the stock is neither overbought nor oversold. Meanwhile, MACD is below its signal line, indicating bearish pressure on the stock.

The combination of neutral RSI and bearish MACD suggests mixed momentum for Medtronic’s stock.

  • Key Resistance: $101.50
  • Key Support: $99.00

Analyst Consensus & Recent Actions: The stock carries a Buy Rating with an average price forecast of $110.29. Recent analyst moves include:

  • Needham: Upgraded to Buy (Target $121)
  • Bernstein: Outperform (Raises Target to $112)
  • Barclays: Overweight (Raises Target to $116)

Valuation Insight: While the stock trades at a premium P/E multiple, the strong consensus and rising estimates suggest analysts view the growth prospects as justification for the 9% upside to analyst targets.

Benzinga Edge Rankings

  • Value: Weak (Score: 23.98) — Trading at a steep premium relative to peers.
  • Quality: Strong (Score: 71.66) — Balance sheet remains healthy.
  • Momentum: Neutral (Score: 58.65) — Stock is performing in line with the broader market.

The Verdict: Medtronic plc’s Benzinga Edge signal reveals a mixed outlook. While the Value score indicates potential overvaluation, the Quality score suggests a solid financial foundation, making it a stock to watch closely.

MDT Price Action: Medtronic shares were up 0.19% at $101.07 at the time of publication on Friday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Image via Shutterstock

data.title: Is ImmunityBio Inc Gaining or Losing Market Support?
data.description:
ImmunityBio Inc's (NYSE:IBRX) short interest as a percent of float has risen 6.44% since its last report. According to exchange reported data, there are now 135.16 million shares sold short, which is 40.85% of all regular shares that are available for trading. Based on its trading volume, it would take traders 1.69 days to cover their short positions on average.

Why Short Interest Matters

Short interest is important to track because it can act as an indicator of market sentiment towards a particular stock. An increase in short interest can signal that investors have become more bearish, while a decrease in short interest can signal they have become more bullish.

ImmunityBio Inc Short Interest Graph (3 Months)

As you can see from the chart above the percentage of shares that are sold short for ImmunityBio Inc has grown since its last report. This does not mean that the stock is going to fall in the near-term but traders should be aware that more shares are being shorted.

Comparing ImmunityBio Inc's Short Interest Against Its Peers

Peer comparison is a popular technique amongst analysts and investors for gauging how well a company is performing. A company's peer is another company that has similar characteristics to it, such as industry, size, age, and financial structure. You can find a company's peer group by reading its 10-K, proxy filing, or by doing your own similarity analysis.

According to Benzinga Pro, ImmunityBio Inc's peer group average for short interest as a percentage of float is 15.35%, which means the company has more short interest than most of its peers.

This article was generated by Benzinga's automated content engine and was reviewed by an editor.

data.title: Spotlight on Baidu: Analyzing the Surge in Options Activity
data.description:
Financial giants have made a conspicuous bearish move on Baidu. Our analysis of options history for Baidu (NASDAQ:BIDU) revealed 15 unusual trades.

Delving into the details, we found 33% of traders were bullish, while 46% showed bearish tendencies. Out of all the trades we spotted, 8 were puts, with a value of $538,287, and 7 were calls, valued at $1,214,125.

Projected Price Targets

Taking into account the Volume and Open Interest on these contracts, it appears that whales have been targeting a price range from $60.0 to $210.0 for Baidu over the last 3 months.

Insights into Volume & Open Interest

Examining the volume and open interest provides crucial insights into stock research. This information is key in gauging liquidity and interest levels for Baidu's options at certain strike prices. Below, we present a snapshot of the trends in volume and open interest for calls and puts across Baidu's significant trades, within a strike price range of $60.0 to $210.0, over the past month.

Baidu Option Volume And Open Interest Over Last 30 Days

Biggest Options Spotted:

About Baidu

Baidu is the largest internet search engine in China with over 50% share of the search engine market in 2024 per web analytics firm, Statcounter. The firm generated 70% of core revenue from online marketing services from its search engine in 2024. Outside its search engine, Baidu is a technology-driven company and its other major growth initiatives are artificial intelligence cloud, video streaming services, voice recognition technology, and autonomous driving.

In light of the recent options history for Baidu, it's now appropriate to focus on the company itself. We aim to explore its current performance.

Current Position of Baidu

  • Trading volume stands at 2,499,745, with BIDU's price down by -1.17%, positioned at $136.76.
  • RSI indicators show the stock to be may be approaching oversold.
  • Earnings announcement expected in 13 days.

What The Experts Say On Baidu

A total of 1 professional analysts have given their take on this stock in the last 30 days, setting an average price target of $147.0.

  • An analyst from Barclays persists with their Equal-Weight rating on Baidu, maintaining a target price of $147.

Options trading presents higher risks and potential rewards. Astute traders manage these risks by continually educating themselves, adapting their strategies, monitoring multiple indicators, and keeping a close eye on market movements.

data.title: ConocoPhillips Greenlights Subsea Gas Development, Approves $1.8 Billion Project
data.description:
ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) on Friday disclosed that its subsidiary, ConocoPhillips Skandinavia AS, and its partners had approved the final investment decision for the Previously Produced Fields (PPF) Project in the Greater Ekofisk Area.

The development and operation plans for PL018B/F and PL044/D are expected to be submitted to the Norwegian Ministry of Energy in the first quarter of 2026.

Details

The company expects the project's capital investment to be around NOK 14 billion ($1.3 billion) for PL018B/F and about NOK 5.5 billion (gross $500 million) for PL044/D.

The joint development concept includes 11 wells and four new subsea templates; all tied back to the Ekofisk Complex via a shared multiphase pipeline, with first gas scheduled for the fourth quarter of 2028.

Steinar Våge, president, Europe, Middle East and Africa for ConocoPhillips  added, "Our focus is on projects with low cost of supply and increased gas delivery to Europe. We are advancing our near-field resource strategy with subsea developments in the GEA, and we value our license partners' support for the PPF Project,"

Following submission of PDOs, the PPF Project is subject to final regulatory approvals.

Recent Earnings Snapshot

Last week, the company reported fourth-quarter FY25 earnings of $1.17 per share, compared with $1.90 per share, in the same quarter last year.

Adjusted EPS totaled $1.02, missing the consensus estimate of $1.11.

Earnings declined 39% year over year (Y/Y) due to lower prices in the quarter. Revenue for the quarter was $14.185 billion, missing the expected $14.194 billion consensus.

ConocoPhillips expects total production to be within 2.33 and 2.36 million barrels of oil equivalent per day (MMBOED), with first quarter production expected at 2.30–2.34 MMBOED.

COP Price Action: ConocoPhillips shares were up 0.57% at $111.46 at the time of publication on Friday. The stock is trading near its 52-week high of $111.98, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Photo via Shutterstock
